description_long: This is a bronze-colored Corinthian-style helmet, reminiscent of those worn by ancient Greek warriors. The helmet features a prominent crest ridge running from front to back along the top, and a smooth, rounded dome that covers the head. The front has a T-shaped opening for the eyes and mouth, with elongated cheek guards that extend downward, providing facial protection. The sides and rear of the helmet are solid, offering full cranial coverage, while the lower edge flares slightly outward for comfort and fit. The surface is metallic and smooth, with a subtle sheen and no visible ornamentation or additional features.
description: A bronze Corinthian-style helmet with a crest ridge, T-shaped face opening, and smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped eye and mouth opening, and the pronounced crest ridge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth dome, crest ridge, and elongated cheek guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back and the continuous crest ridge.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the helmet's profile and cheek guard.
